name: dreo-dev
description: Development environment for reverse engineering the Dreo ecosystem and building a reusable API and ioBroker adapter.
author: mehrwiedu

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:sdk && npm run build:sdk && npm run typecheck:adapter && npm run typecheck:examples
scripts.build: npm run build:sdk && npm run build:adapter
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run build
